code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
제공된 대상 URL 문자열이 제공된 도메인 내에 있는지 확인합니다.
그렇다면 리디렉션을 위한 대상 URL을 반환하고, 그렇지 않으면 리디렉션을 위한 도메인 URL로 대체합니다.
https 프로토콜을 사용합니다.

예시:
	get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: 대상 URL 문자열입니다.
@param domain: 프로토콜이 없는 도메인 문자열입니다.

@return 리디렉션을 위한 URL 문자열입니다.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Checks if the provided target URL string is within the given domain.
If so, returns the target URL for redirection; otherwise, replaces it with the domain URL for redirection.
Uses the HTTPS protocol.

Example:
	get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string without a protocol.

@return The URL string for redirection.
prompt_2_segments:
Проверьте, находится ли предоставленная строка целевого URL в указанном домене.
Если да, верните целевой URL для перенаправления; в противном случае используйте URL домена для перенаправления.
Используйте протокол https.

Примеры:
	get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Строка целевого URL.
@param domain: Строка домена, без протокола.

@return Строка URL для перенаправления.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is in the specified domain.
If yes, return the target URL for redirection; otherwise, use the domain URL for redirection.
Use the https protocol.

Examples:
	get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Target URL string.
@param domain: Domain string, without the protocol.

@return String URL for redirection.
prompt_3_segments:
제공된 대상 URL 문자열이 제공된 도메인 내에 있는지 확인합니다.
그렇다면 리디렉션을 위한 대상 URL을 반환하고, 그렇지 않으면 리디렉션을 위한 도메인 URL로 대체합니다.
https 프로토콜을 사용합니다.

예시:
	get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: 대상 URL 문자열입니다.
@param domain: 프로토콜이 없는 도메인 문자열입니다.

@return 리디렉션을 위한 URL 문자열입니다.
prompt_3_bt_segments_en:
Checks if the provided target URL string is within the given domain.
If so, returns the target URL for redirection; otherwise, replaces it with the domain URL for redirection.
Uses the HTTPS protocol.

Example:
	get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string without a protocol.

@return The URL string for redirection.

prompts_en: Initialize the archive writer
Read and extract each entry
Create full path
Write header
Copy data
prompt_1_segments:
Тар файлын агуулгыг заасан зорилтот замд гаргах.
Хэрвээ гаргалт амжилттай бол true буцаана; эсвэл гаргалтын явцад ямар нэг алдаа гарвал (жишээ нь, файл олдсонгүй, зөвшөөрлийн алдаа, бүх агуулгыг гаргаж чадахгүй), зүгээр л false буцаана.

Зөвлөмж: Дараах код нь libarchive номын санг ашиглан тар файлын агуулгыг заасан зорилтот замд хэрхэн гаргахыг харуулж байна.
Архивын бичигчийг эхлүүлэх
Бүх бичлэгийг уншиж, гаргах
Бүтэн замыг үүсгэх
Гарчиг бичих
Мэдээллийг хуулбарлах
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: Extract the contents of the tar file to the specified target path. If the extraction is successful, return true; otherwise, return false if any error occurs during the extraction process (e.g., file not found, permission error, unable to extract all contents).
Initialize the archive writer
Read all entries and extract
Create the full path
Write the header
Copy the data
prompt_2_segments:
주어진 목적지 경로로 tar 파일의 내용을 추출합니다.
추출이 성공하면 true를 반환하고, 그렇지 않으면 추출 과정 중 오류가 발생하면(예: 파일을 찾을 수 없음, 권한 오류, 모든 내용을 추출할 수 없음) false를 반환합니다.

힌트: 다음 코드는 libarchive 라이브러리를 사용하여 주어진 목적지 경로로 tar 파일의 내용을 추출하는 방법을 보여줍니다.
아카이브 작성기를 초기화합니다.
각 항목을 읽고 추출합니다.
전체 경로를 생성합니다.
헤더를 작성합니다.
데이터를 복사합니다.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en: Extracts the contents of a tar file to the given destination path. Returns true if the extraction is successful, and false if an error occurs during the extraction process (e.g., file not found, permission error, unable to extract all contents).\n\nHint: The following code demonstrates how to extract the contents of a tar file to the given destination path using the libarchive library.
Initializes the archive writer.
Reads and extracts each item.
Generates the full path.
Writes the header.
Copies the data.

추출이 성공하면 true를 반환하고, 그렇지 않으면 추출 과정 중 오류가 발생하면(예: 파일을 찾을 수 없음, 권한 오류, 모든 내용을 추출할 수 없음) false를 반환합니다.

데이터를 복사합니다.
prompt_3_bt_segments_en: Extracts the contents of a tar file to the given destination path. Returns true if the extraction is successful, and false if an error occurs during the extraction process (e.g., file not found, permission error, unable to extract all contents).\n\nHint: The following code demonstrates how to extract the contents of a tar file to the given destination path using the libarchive library.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char *create_private_key() {
prompt_1_segments:
Генерируйте приватный RSA-ключ, экспортируйте его в формате PEM и верните его в виде строки.
Выполните команду "openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:<key_length> 2>/dev/null" для генерации ключа.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Generate a private RSA key, export it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Run the command "openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:<key_length> 2>/dev/null" to generate the key.
prompt_2_segments:
Генерируйте приватный RSA-ключ, экспортируйте его в формате PEM и верните его в виде строки.
Выполните команду "openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:<key_length> 2>/dev/null" для генерации ключа.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en:
Generate a private RSA key, export it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Run the command "openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:<key_length> 2>/dev/null" to generate the key.

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: shell команду гүйцэтгэх болон түүний гаралтыг барих функц; дуудагч нь саналыг чөлөөлөх үүрэгтэй; энэ функцийг хэрэгжүүлэх шаардлагагүй, учир нь энэ нь өгөгдсөн, гэхдээ үүнийг ашиглахын тулд анх зарлах хэрэгтэй.

Нууц DSA түлхүүрийг үүсгэж, PEM форматаар экспортолж, утга болгон буцаана.
Зөвлөмж: DSA параметрийн файлыг үүсгэх болон DSA нууц түлхүүрийг дараах байдлаар гүйцэтгэх shell командуудыг ашиглана:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <параметрүүдийг хадгалах түр файл> <түлхүүрийн урт>`
2. `openssl gendsa <параметрүүдийг хадгалах түр файл>`
DSA параметрийн файлын хувьд өвөрмөц түр файл нэрийг үүсгэхийн тулд `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` ашиглаж болно.
@return Үүсгэсэн DSA нууц түлхүүр PEM форматаар, эсвэл алдаа гарсан бол NULL.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: Function to execute a shell command and capture its output; the caller is responsible for freeing the suggestion; this function does not need to be implemented as it is provided, but it must be declared initially to use it.

Generate a secret DSA key, export it in PEM format, and return it as a value.
Recommendation: Use the following shell commands to generate the DSA parameter file and the DSA secret key:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store parameters> <key length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file to store parameters>`
To create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file, you can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);`.
@return The generated DSA secret key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_2_segments: shell команду гүйцэтгэх ба түүний гаралтыг барих функц; дуудагч нь саналыг чөлөөлөх үүрэгтэй; энэ функцийг хэрэгжүүлэх шаардлагагүй, учир нь энэ нь өгөгдсөн, гэхдээ үүнийг ашиглахын тулд анх зарлах хэрэгтэй.

Нууц DSA түлхүүр үүсгэж, PEM форматаар экспортолж, утга болгон буцаана.
Зөвлөмж: DSA параметрийн файлыг үүсгэж, DSA нууц түлхүүрийг дараах байдлаар гүйцэтгэх shell командуудыг ашиглана:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <параметрүүдийг хадгалах түр файл> <түлхүүрийн урт>`
2. `openssl gendsa <параметрүүдийг хадгалах түр файл>`
DSA параметрийн файлын хувьд өвөрмөц түр файл нэр үүсгэхийн тулд `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` ашиглаж болно.
@return Үүсгэсэн DSA нууц түлхүүр PEM форматаар, эсвэл алдаа гарсан бол NULL.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en: Function to execute a shell command and capture its output; the caller is responsible for freeing the suggestion; this function does not need to be implemented as it is provided, but it must be declared initially to use it.

Generate a secret DSA key, export it in PEM format, and return it as a value.
Recommendation: Use the following shell commands to generate a DSA parameter file and execute the DSA secret key:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store parameters> <key length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file to store parameters>`
To create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file, `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` can be used.
@return The generated DSA secret key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_3_segments: shell команду гүйцэтгэх болон түүний гаралтыг барих функц; дуудагч нь саналыг чөлөөлөх үүрэгтэй; энэ функцийг хэрэгжүүлэх шаардлагагүй, учир нь энэ нь өгөгдсөн, гэхдээ үүнийг ашиглахын тулд анх зарлах хэрэгтэй.

Нууц DSA түлхүүрийг үүсгэж, PEM форматаар экспортолж, утга болгон буцаана.
Зөвлөмж: DSA параметрийн файлыг үүсгэх болон DSA нууц түлхүүрийг дараах байдлаар shell командуудыг гүйцэтгэнэ:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <параметрүүдийг хадгалах түр файл> <түлхүүрийн урт>`
2. `openssl gendsa <параметрүүдийг хадгалах түр файл>`
DSA параметрийн файлын хувьд өвөрмөц түр файл нэрийг үүсгэхийн тулд `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` ашиглаж болно.
@return Үүсгэсэн DSA нууц түлхүүр PEM форматаар, эсвэл алдаа гарсан бол NULL.
prompt_3_bt_segments_en: Function to execute a shell command and capture its output; the caller is responsible for freeing the suggestion; this function does not need to be implemented as it is given, but it must be declared initially to use it.

Generate a secret DSA key, export it in PEM format, and return it as a value.
Recommendation: Execute the following shell commands to create the DSA parameter file and the DSA secret key:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store parameters> <key length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file to store parameters>`
To create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file, you can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);`.
@return The generated DSA secret key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A pointer to a StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.
prompt_1_segments:
XML данныег хураан, өгөгдсөн хэрэглэгчийн нэр болон нууц үгийн дагуу оюутны мэдээллийг буцаана. XML данные дараах бүтэцтэй байна:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Бид XPath асуулгыг бүтээж, үүнийг хайхад ашиглаж болно.

@param xml_data Оюутны мэдээллийг агуулсан XML данные.
@param username Хайх оюутны хэрэглэгчийн нэр.
@param password Хайх оюутны нууц үг.

@return Оюутан олдвол StudentInfo бүтэц рүү заасан заагчийг буцаана. Үгүй бол NULL буцаана.

<students>

copy all content in buf to out

오프셋 14에서 buf에 파일 내용을 읽습니다.
buf의 모든 내용을 out으로 복사합니다.
